admission_type: restricted access – verification of requirements and personal preparation
admission_test_type: Verification of curricular requirements and personal preparation; possible interview
application_platform: MoveIN platform for non-EU pre-selection; Infostud for admission

academic_requirements.prior_degree: A three-year bachelor's degree in Psychology, Cognitive Science, Neuroscience, Biology, or related field

language_requirements.level: B2 CEFR in English (general Sapienza requirement; programme taught in English for both Italian and foreign students)
language_requirements.note: Courses are taught in English for both Italian and foreign students.

italian_language_requirement: Italian not required for admission; programme taught in English.
application_deadline_eu: 31 July 2026 for EU and EU-equivalent candidates [uncertain]
application_deadline_non_eu: MoveIN pre-selection window 22 December 2025 – 15 May 2026 for non-EU candidates residing abroad
application_fee: €30 per application via MoveIN (max 2 per candidate)
required_documents: Bachelor's degree certificate or enrolment certificate
For foreign qualifications: Declaration of Value (DoV) or CIMEA statement
document_translation_authentication: Foreign documents require official translation and legalization/apostille plus Declaration of Value (DoV) or CIMEA statement.

entry_exam_or_test.selection: Verification of curricular requirements and personal preparation

source_quotes.quote: Programme Name: Cognitive neuroscience; Degree Class: LM-51; Course Code: 33574; Faculty: Medicina e Psicologia; Language: English
Courses are taught in English for both Italian and foreign students
